name: gradflow
paperTitle: GradFlow: Measuring and Predicting Knowledge Propagation
content:
## Introduction

Gradient flow analysis reveals how information propagates; predicting flow patterns enables early detection of training issues. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

Gradient flow analysis reveals how information propagates; predicting flow patterns enables early detection of training issues.

```
  │   └─ Main computation
  │
  ├─→ [Processing Stage 2]
  │   └─ Refinement
  │
  └─→ Output
```
